posts.author: PPI (Daniel Spaizman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Writing to comment on some of the CommuniHub Email Formatting issues I have found:

  1. Adding variables (pulse column data) inserts line spaces throughout the email
  2. Column formatting doesn’t carry over when you send an email (example: column data has “$500”, data in email shows as “500”)
  3. Lists (may be a problem confined to using templates) that should be:
    1. Item 1
      a. Subitem 1

all show up as Items, no subitems will appear.

Thanks for any details on what I may doing incorrectly to cause these errors or whether they are just improvements that should be made.
